meta.title: Shaper: Data Shaper (minpause_600s)
description: Shaper: Data Shaper (minpause_600s) replays live-power input through the current shaper rather than solar-divert control.
Long minimum pause interval after stopping charge. This should suppress rapid restart cycling.
Compare live power, smoothed live power, shaper maximum, available charge power, and actual charge power to see how the limiter reacts.
